demographics.occupation: job requiring long hours of standing

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg veins always ache by the end of the day, but today one of the bulging veins has turned into a hard, red, agonizingly painful cord.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: One of the big lumpy veins on my inner left calf suddenly went hard, red and unbearably sore over the last day, and I'm limping — I'm worried it's turned into something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: the big bulging veins have been there for years; the new hard red painful bit came on over the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: chronic aching for years; the acute hard red lump for about a day
symptom_narrative.character: the old problem is a dull ache and heaviness; the new bit is a firm, rope-like, intensely sore lump you can feel under the skin
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the ache is a nuisance but the new hard red area is severe and throbbing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: twisted bulging veins on both lower legs; the hard, red, sore lump is on the inner part of the left calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the ache is worse at the end of the day and after standing; the new sore lump is constant since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: putting my legs up usually eases the ache
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing for long periods at work makes the ache much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the red area is really itchy; I've had dry, discoloured skin around my ankles for a while
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: years of aching, heavy, cramping legs, but never a hard red painful lump like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm limping and keeping the weight off my left leg

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing bulging, twisted veins on both lower legs

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works on her feet for long hours; the prolonged standing seems to make the leg aching worse

objective_data_offered.value: large, twisted, rope-like bulging veins visible on both lower legs
a red, firm, cord-like lump about 5cm long running along a bulging vein on the inner left calf, very tender to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video appearance only; firmness and tenderness are self-reported, not clinician-palpated

objective_data_offered.value: dry, flaky, brownish-discoloured skin around both ankles
limping and keeping weight off the left leg because of the pain
wearing tight socks with elastic bands that leave marks around the calves
